auth.signInTitle: Sign in to your Nomade account
auth.signInSubtitle: Open your browser flow or use your password. Built for mobile + agent continuity.
auth.name: Full name
auth.magicLinkHint: Magic link is login-only. If the account does not exist, sign up first.
auth.signupSubtitle: Email verification is required before first sign in.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password to recover your account.
auth.verifySubtitle: We are validating your email token.
auth.activateSubtitle: Approve the temporary user code from your terminal or mobile app.
auth.verificationRequired: Email verification required before account access.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Your workspace-level identity and plan entitlements.

devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: Registered agents paired with your account.
devices.name: Name

ui.quickActionsSubtitle: Manage devices, plan and account settings.
ui.deviceCodeReadyBody: Use mobile/agent browser approval with the same account.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Upgrade and manage your Stripe subscription.

toasts.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to verify your address.
toasts.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent if the account exists.
toasts.resetLinkSent: If the account exists, a reset link has been sent.
toasts.passwordUpdated: Password updated. You can sign in now.
toasts.loginApproved: Login approved. You can return to your terminal/app.

errors.missing_authorization: Session missing. Please sign in again.
errors.invalid_token: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
errors.csrf_origin_mismatch: Security check failed. Reload and retry from the same site.
errors.sign_up_disabled: Sign-up is disabled for this flow. Use account creation first.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait and retry.
errors.magic_link_expired: This magic link expired. Request a new one.
errors.magic_link_failed: Magic link sign-in failed. Please request a new link.
